item.title: What do Barcelona need in transfer market?
item.description: Losing top spot in LaLiga has exposed squad issues that must be addressed this summer.

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool look to Spurs' Bergvall
item.description: Liverpool are considering making a move for Tottenham Hotspur midfielder Lucas Bergvall. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: MLBPA elevates Meyer after Clark's resignation
item.description: The Major League Baseball Players Association unanimously elected Bruce Meyer as its interim executive director Wednesday, the union announced.

item.title: 'Just relief': U.S. survives OT thriller to reach semis
item.description: The U.S. men are moving on to the semifinals at the Olympics thanks to Quinn Hughes, after needing extra hockey to get through the quarterfinals Wedne...

item.title: Report: Hornets' Ball uninjured after car crash
item.description: LaMelo Ball was not injured after being involved in a two-car crash in downtown Charlotte on Wednesday, a source told The Associated Press.
